transcript.clean_text: the general Italia is available to watch each and every day live and On Demand on gtn Plus the Peloton and fans alike were gearing up for the first big mountain top finish an historical finish Grand Sasol Italia Campo imperator where Marco pantani won in 1999 and Simon Yates was a winner in the Maya Rosa in a beautiful breathtaking bit of landscape in the heart of the apennines at high over 2000 meters the 2023 visit to Grand Sasso would be 219 kilometers long starting in kapwa and heading due north going through casterly sangro for an intermediate Sprint rocarazo add up two classified climbs to the Finish almost a copy paste of the stage that Yates won in 2018 not the hardest finish in terms of gradient but the altitude coming into play a big day on the bike it looked very briefly look we might see a big fight for the Breakaway as well but any hope of that was extinguished when four men went away inside the first 10 kilometers patelli the Italian was there alongside vatsec the Czech mulbraham from Eritrea and bais the other Italian there as behind it the intermediate Sprint it would be Burleson who would take points back on Jonathan Milan in the fight for the maliochic lamino team desen had the maliaroza and they would fight to defend it they'd control the race making sure that petilli wouldn't threaten that pink jersey but not much else was happening behind apart from a barbecue that is the local dish add on hand to the Riders as they dropped away from the main bunch picking up easy King of the mountains points but at the end of the day he'd relinquished the Jersey because the Breakaway would be given the stage the main group not interested on a day that was for spectacle one to forget but for the Breakaway one that they will remember forever they got into the final kilometer with plenty of opportunity to fight a grand total of zero Pro with victories between three remaining Riders mubrahana dropped off halfway through the stage and David would be there fastest to the line only the second stage win in three attempts at the jeded Italia down the years now winning at Gran Sasso second place to vatsec third there going to patili ah behind evil just about showing strength as the rest came in without gaps there will be no change in the general classification likeness and keeping pink base with a surprise of the day the light on the bus and back in the Eurosport Spain commentary box as well Alberto contaro's team Victorious and the result was that David advice would be the stage winner that's a second petili third and then the rest no bonus seconds left by the time that evening Paul and Company came across the line points going to titibo Pino in the king of the mountains competition but he'd lose that Jersey as likenessen kept think for a fourth date now the Norwegian that has spent most time in the mayarosa in the history of the general Italia Evan Paul still at 28 seconds at 30. stage 8 a potential banana skin going north going east and again over 200 kilometers a three-star stage with a finale that we've seen before in tirenadri article the stage finishes in fosombroni goes twice up the salitare capuchini the only time a cappuccino will be permitted after 11AM in Italy legit Italia continues you can watch it live and on demand as we near the first rest day on gcn Plus
